channel.title: Frontion News - Geopolitical Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Launches Largest Drone Attack on Moscow in Over a Year
item.description: At least four people were killed as Ukraine struck the Russian capital with over 1,000 drones in 24 hours, marking the biggest aerial assault on Moscow since the war began. The attack came in retaliation for Russia's heaviest drone and missile strikes on Kyiv.

item.title: ⚔️ Russia and Ukraine Accuse Each Other of Violating US-Brokered Ceasefire
item.description: Both sides claimed casualties from drone and artillery strikes during a three-day ceasefire announced by President Trump. Zelenskyy said Russia was "not even particularly trying" to observe the truce, while Ukraine pledged to retaliate against any aggression.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 US and China Reach Preliminary Deal to Lower Tariffs After Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: China agreed to billions in additional US farm purchases as both nations struck a preliminary agreement to reduce tariffs on certain goods. The deal leaves major issues unresolved as Trump races against a July deadline for agreements with other trading partners.

item.title: ☢️ UAE Blames Iran for Drone Strike Near Barakah Nuclear Power Plant
item.description: The United Arab Emirates accused Iran or its proxies of launching a drone that sparked a fire just outside the Barakah nuclear facility. No radiation leaks were reported, but the incident marks a dangerous escalation as Iran war ceasefire talks remain stalled.

item.title: 🇪🇺 NATO Defense Ministers Meet Without US Leadership Amid Questions
item.description: European allies downplayed concerns after US Defense Secretary Hegseth skipped the NATO gathering in Brussels, marking the second consecutive high-level US absence. Germany and Iceland insisted the alliance remains strong despite the unusual US no-shows.

item.title: 🇫🇷 G7 Finance Chiefs Convene in Paris to Tackle Trade Imbalances
item.description: Finance ministers from G7 nations meet in Paris to coordinate critical raw material supplies and address global economic tensions amid geopolitical differences threatening group cohesion.

item.title: 🇦🇪 Drone Strike Hits UAE Barakah Nuclear Plant Amid Iran War Deadlock
item.description: A drone strike caused a fire at the UAE sole nuclear power plant, with Emirati officials investigating the source and vowing response to what they called a terrorist attack.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel to Establish Defense Offices in Former UNRWA East Jerusalem Compound
item.description: Israel plans to set up defense offices in the former UNRWA compound in East Jerusalem after demolishing structures, a move the UN agency called a violation of international law.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Destroyed Over 3,000 Ukrainian Drones in Past Week
item.description: Russian defense ministry reports intercepting and destroying at least 3,124 Ukrainian drones over the past week, as Ukraine continues its drone campaign against Russian targets.

item.title: 🇦🇪🤖💰 UAE Pivots from Oil to AI as Post-War Economic Strategy
item.description: With its OPEC era over, the UAE is betting big on artificial intelligence to build economic bridges to the Global South, bolstered by cutting-edge Nvidia chip deliveries. The strategy has been tested by Iranian attacks on Emirati data centers during the US-Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇪🇺🇺🇦 Kremlin Signals Readiness to Resume Dialogue with Europe on Ukraine War
item.description: Kremlin spokesperson Dmitry Peskov said Moscow is open to restarting dialogue with Europe over the war in Ukraine, following a major Ukrainian drone attack on the Moscow region. The comments come as European officials debate future engagement with Moscow amid uncertainty over US peace efforts.

item.title: 🇵🇭⚖️🏛️ Philippine VP Sara Duterte Faces Senate Impeachment Trial
item.description: Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte faces a senate impeachment trial on charges including bribery, corruption, and threatening the president's life. The outcome could reshape the 2028 presidential race and determine the Duterte clan's future in national politics.

item.title: 🇩🇪🇫🇷🇬🇧🇯🇵🇺🇸🇨🇦🇮🇹 G7 Finance Ministers Meet in Paris Amid Trade Tensions and Iran War Fallout
item.description: Finance ministers from the Group of Seven nations convene in Paris to address global economic imbalances and coordinate critical raw material supplies. Geopolitical differences over the Iran conflict threaten to test the group's unity as the Strait of Hormuz blockade disrupts energy markets.

item.title: 🇩🇪🇪🇺 German Finance Minister Calls G7 the Right Forum to End Iran Conflict
item.description: German Finance Minister Lars Klingbeil says the G7 is the appropriate platform to discuss ending the war in Iran, which along with the Strait of Hormuz blockade poses a serious threat to the global economy. The statement comes ahead of the G7 finance ministers meeting in Paris.

item.title: 🇨🇩🇺🇬🇺🇸 CDC Aiding Withdrawal of Americans Potentially Exposed to Ebola in Congo
item.description: The US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention is helping withdraw Americans who may have been exposed to Ebola during the outbreak in Congo and Uganda. A CDC official stressed that the risk to the United States remains low.

item.title: 🇨🇩🇺🇬🇺🇸 Washington Post: CDC Readies Team to Respond to Ebola Outbreak
item.description: The CDC is preparing a response team as the WHO declares the Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda a public health emergency. Health officials are coordinating with international partners to contain the spread of the virus.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan President responds to Trump summit: 'We will not be sacrificed'
item.description: Taiwan President Lai Ching-te pushed back after Trump raised doubts about US arms sales and willingness to defend the island following his Beijing summit with Xi Jinping.

item.title: 🏛️ Senate parliamentarian blocks $1 billion White House security funding
item.description: The Senate parliamentarian ruled that Republican efforts to allocate funding for Trump's proposed White House ballroom project cannot proceed through budget reconciliation.

item.title: 🏴 Political executions surge in Iran since war began, UN verifies at least 32
item.description: The United Nations has verified the execution of at least 32 political prisoners in Iran since the US-Israel war began on February 28.

item.title: 🇮🇱⚔️ IDF Extends Death Penalty Law to West Bank Palestinians Convicted of Terror
item.description: Israel Defense Forces Central Command chief has applied a new death penalty law to Palestinians in the West Bank convicted of terrorism, expanding capital punishment beyond Israel proper.

item.title: 🇦🇷✈️ Argentina Retires A-4 Fightinghawks After Six Decades
item.description: Argentina has finally stood down its A-4 Skyhawks, the type's first export operator, after 60 years of service as the country introduces its first F-16s.

item.title: 🇳🇴🇨🇳🕵️ Norway Arrests Chinese Man for Spying
item.description: Norway's interior security service has arrested a Chinese national on suspicion of espionage, marking another case of alleged Chinese intelligence activity in Europe.

item.title: 🦠 WHO Declares Ebola Outbreak in Congo and Uganda Global Health Emergency
item.description: The World Health Organization designated the Ebola outbreak in Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda a public health emergency of international concern, with at least 80 deaths reported and no approved vaccines for this strain.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Drone Attack Kills Four in Moscow's Biggest Strike in Over a Year
item.description: At least four people were killed after Ukraine launched its largest drone attack on Moscow in more than a year, demonstrating Kyiv's ability to strike targets over 300 miles from the border despite dense Russian air defenses.

item.title: 🇨🇺 Cuba Accuses US of Fabricating Drone Threat Claims
item.description: Cuban Foreign Minister Bruno Rodriguez dismissed US intelligence reports about Cuban drone acquisitions from Russia and Iran as a "fraudulent case" designed to justify sanctions and potential military intervention.
